rationale: Clear, well-sequenced, and highly practical. It gives specific actions tenants can take immediately, with strong safety guidance and useful details on documentation and insurance. Slightly loses simplicity and economy through a polished intro/title and a bit of extra explanation, but overall it is very effective for the task.
